name: fhconfig
documentation:
# fhconfig

[![PyPI - Version](https://img.shields.io/pypi/v/fhconfig.svg)](https://pypi.org/project/fhconfig)
[![PyPI - Python Version](https://img.shields.io/pypi/pyversions/fhconfig.svg)](https://pypi.org/project/fhconfig)

-----

## Table of Contents

- [Installation](#installation)
- [License](#license)

## Installation

```console
pip install fhconfig
```

## License

`fhconfig` is distributed under the terms of the [MIT](https://spdx.org/licenses/MIT.html) license.

modules.name: fhconfig.validation
documentation: AppConf - Validation.

functions.name: fhconfig.validation.validate_key
documentation:
Validate an application ID or a setting/file key.

If `key` is valid, this function does nothing. Otherwise, a
`KeyValidationError` exception is raised.

```
param key

Application ID or setting/file key.
```

variables.name: fhconfig.validation.KEY_RE
documentation: Setting/file key regular expression

classes.name: fhconfig.validation.KeyValidationError

methods.name: fhconfig.validation.KeyValidationError.__init__
documentation: Class initializer.
Exception for application ID or setting/file key validation errors.

modules.name: fhconfig.files
documentation: AppConf - Files.

classes.name: fhconfig.files.FilesManager

methods.name: fhconfig.files.FilesManager.__init__
documentation:
Initialize the instance with a file directory path.

The files or directories managed by this class are inside the root
directory (`root_path`). If the root directory doesn't exist, it will
be created along all its intermediate directories the first time the
`get_path` method is called.

```
param root_path

Relative or absolute path of the root directory. If
```

it's a relative path, it's converted to its absolute path.

methods.name: fhconfig.files.FilesManager.root_path
documentation:
Return the absolute path of the root directory.

```
return

Directory path.
```

methods.name: fhconfig.files.FilesManager.get_path
documentation:
Return the absolute path of a managed file or directory.

The path returned is the absolute path of the root directory
(`self._root_path`) followed by the name of the given file or directory
(`name`). If the root directory doesn't exist, it's created along all
its intermediate directories.

```
param name

File/directory name.

return

File/directory path.
```
User configuration file manager.

modules.name: fhconfig
documentation:
AppConf.

AppConf is a App configuration management Python library. It stores key-value
settings in a JSON file and manages data files and directories. The JSON file
and the data files and directories are inside a directory that is inside the
user home directory.

classes.name: fhconfig.AppConf

methods.name: fhconfig.AppConf.__init__
documentation:
Initialize the instance with an application ID.

The user configuration is stored in a directory named ".\<app_id>"
inside the user home/cwd directory. A `KeyValidationError` exception is
raised if the ID is invalid.

```
param app_id

Application ID. It must contain at least 1 character and
```

must contain and only letters, numbers, hyphens or underscores.

methods.name: fhconfig.AppConf.app_id
documentation:
Get the application ID.

```
return

Application ID.
```

methods.name: fhconfig.AppConf.app_id
documentation:
Set the application ID.

A `KeyValidationError` exception is raised if the ID invalid.

```
param app_id

Application ID. The name of the data directory is a
```

period (".") followed by the application ID. The data directory is
inside the user home directory. This ID must contain at least 1
character and must contain only letters, numbers, hyphens or
underscores.

methods.name: fhconfig.AppConf.data_path
documentation:
Return the absolute path of the data directory.

```
return

Directory path.
```

documentation:

```
return

 instance.
```

documentation:

```
return

 instance.
```
App configuration manager.

modules.name: fhconfig.settings
documentation: AppConf - Settings.

classes.name: fhconfig.settings.SettingsManager

methods.name: fhconfig.settings.SettingsManager.__init__
documentation:
Initialize the instance loading the data from a settings JSON file.

If the file doesn't exist initially, it will be created, along all its
intermediate directories, the first time a setting key is added or
deleted.

```
param path

Relative or absolute path of the settings JSON file. If
```

it's a relative path, it's converted to its absolute path.

methods.name: fhconfig.settings.SettingsManager._load
documentation: Load the data from the settings JSON file.

methods.name: fhconfig.settings.SettingsManager._save
documentation:
Save the data to the settings JSON file.

The file and all its intermediate directories are created if they don't
exist.

methods.name: fhconfig.settings.SettingsManager.path
documentation:
Return the absolute path of the settings JSON file.

```
return

File path.
```

methods.name: fhconfig.settings.SettingsManager.get_all
documentation:
Get all the setting keys.
在python3.8及以下的版本当中，不支持在类型注解时指定容器类型的内含类型，但是这一功能在3.9以上的版本是被支持的

```
return

Keys.
```

methods.name: fhconfig.settings.SettingsManager.contains
documentation:
Return whether a setting exists.

A `KeyValidationError` exception is raised if the setting key is
invalid.

```
param key

Setting key. It must contain at least 1 character and must
```

contain and only letters, numbers, hyphens or underscores.
\:return: Whether the setting exists.

methods.name: fhconfig.settings.SettingsManager.get
documentation:
Return the value of a setting.

A `KeyValidationError` exception is raised if the setting key is
invalid. If the setting doesn't exist, a default value is returned.

```
param key

Setting key. It must contain at least 1 character and must
```

contain and only letters, numbers, hyphens or underscores.
\:param default: Value to return if the setting doesn't exist.
\:return: Setting value or `default`.

methods.name: fhconfig.settings.SettingsManager.set
documentation:
Set the value of a setting.

A `KeyValidationError` exception is raised if the setting key is
invalid.

```
param key

Setting key. It must contain at least 1 character and must
```

contain only letters, numbers, hyphens or underscores.
\:param value: Setting value. It must be serializable to JSON.

methods.name: fhconfig.settings.SettingsManager.delete
documentation:
Delete a setting.

A `KeyValidationError` exception is raised if the setting key is
invalid.

```
param key

Setting key. It must contain at least 1 character and must
```

contain only letters, numbers, hyphens or underscores.

methods.name: fhconfig.settings.SettingsManager.delete_all
documentation: Delete all the settings.
App configuration settings manager.
